common.activeAlerts: {count, plural, one {# active alert} other {# active alerts}}
common.notConfiguredYet: No description configured for the public pricing page yet.

dashboard.title: Platform Administration
dashboard.subtitle: Manage tenants, pricing, subscriptions, and platform operations.
dashboard.operationsAlertsDescription: Job backlog, worker failures, edge-function failures, and recent client-side error spikes.
dashboard.noActiveAlerts: No active production alerts right now. The queue and edge functions are currently healthy.

operations.recentJobFailuresDescription: Latest retrying, failed, and dead-letter jobs across all tenants.
operations.recentJobFailuresEmpty: No recent job failures or retries.
operations.clientErrorTrendDescription: Browser-side error volume across the last six 15-minute buckets.
operations.clientErrorTrendEmpty: No client error trend data available yet.
operations.recentSystemErrorsDescription: Latest warning and error logs captured by workers and edge functions.
operations.drillDownDescription: Filter the platform signals by tenant before retrying background work.
operations.activityStreamDescription: Recent super-admin actions with request IDs for incident correlation.

clinics.title: Tenant Lifecycle
clinics.description: Create clinics, update tenant identity details, and suspend, deactivate, or reactivate access.

pricing.title: Pricing Catalog
pricing.description: Manage the public SaaS plans, billing defaults, and the catalog that subscriptions map to.
pricing.empty: No pricing plans are configured yet.

tenantForm.description: Manage the clinic identity record that staff accounts, subscriptions, and feature access attach to.
tenantForm.addressPlaceholder: Clinic address used across admin and patient-facing surfaces.

pricingDialog.description: Manage the canonical SaaS plan catalog that controls public pricing and subscription billing defaults.
pricingDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Short marketing description for the public pricing page.
pricingDialog.featuresPlaceholder:
One feature per line
Advanced reports
Inventory management

tenantModules.title: Tenant modules
tenantModules.description: Enable or disable tenant-level modules for {tenantName}. Changes apply immediately.

advanced_reports.title: Reports & Analytics
advanced_reports.description: Controls advanced reporting, dashboards, and analytics views.

lab_module.title: Laboratory
lab_module.description: Controls lab orders, structured results, and laboratory operations.

pharmacy_module.title: Pharmacy
pharmacy_module.description: Controls pharmacy inventory, medication stock, and dispensing workflows.

insurance_module.title: Insurance
insurance_module.description: Controls claims, follow-up queues, and insurance operations.

tenantUsage.title: Tenant usage
tenantUsage.description: Review storage, activity, and workload before making platform-level changes for {tenantName}.
tenantUsage.empty: No usage data is available for this tenant yet.

jobRetry.descriptionOne: This will requeue the selected failed job{tenantName}.
jobRetry.descriptionMany: This will requeue {count, plural, one {# failed job} other {# failed jobs}}{tenantName}. Only retry idempotent jobs that are safe to run again.
jobRetry.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this retry is safe and necessary.

tenantStatusDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Billing hold, compliance review, contract termination, ownership transfer, etc.

active.title: Reactivate tenant
active.description: Restore clinic access for staff and patient-facing workflows.

suspended.title: Suspend tenant
suspended.description: Pause clinic access without treating the tenant as permanently shut down.

deactivated.title: Deactivate tenant
deactivated.description: Block clinic access for this tenant until a super admin reactivates it.

dialogs.confirmSubscriptionChangeMessage: Are you sure you want to change {field} to "{value}"?
dialogs.deletePricingPlanMessage: Delete "{name}" from the catalog? This will fail if tenants still depend on the plan.

toasts.impersonationStartedDescription: You are now viewing {tenantName} as a super admin.
toasts.tenantCreatedDescription: The clinic has been added to the platform.
toasts.tenantSavedDescription: The tenant changes were applied successfully.
toasts.tenantSaveFailedDescription: The tenant record could not be saved.
toasts.tenantModuleFailedDescription: The tenant module flag could not be updated.
toasts.pricingPlanCreatedDescription: The new plan is now available to the platform.
toasts.pricingUpdatedDescription: The pricing catalog changes were saved successfully.
toasts.pricingSaveFailedDescription: The pricing plan could not be saved.
toasts.pricingDeleteFailedDescription: This plan may still be assigned to active tenants.
